overall_status: PARTIAL CLOSURE — PRIMARY LITERATURE IDENTIFIES TESTAGEN AS KEDG; SUPPLIER TERMINI, SALT, ANALYTICAL IDENTITY AND HUMAN EVIDENCE REMAIN OPEN

regulatory_records.current_status: Testagen is identified in primary in-vitro literature as KEDG, but supplier-product equivalence and human clinical benefit remain unestablished.
regulatory_records.next_review_trigger: Identity, approval, trademark, warning, recall, enforcement, counterfeit, safety or anti-doping change
